summary: Read-only audit completed for finish_task knowledge growth. Verdict: FAIL overall because the growth path creates candidate and review records and preserves used memory paths, but it also writes an auto-generated task_summary_memory under 60_Operations/task-summaries with status accepted; 60_Operations is a default retrieval root and current wiki-index evidence shows task summaries indexed, so unreviewed generated summaries can enter retrieval before candidate approval.
decisions: finish_task trace fields preserve used_memory_paths, context_pack_paths, session_archive_paths, and candidate_paths after normalization.
finish_task auto-growth routes the 50_Instances memory through pending candidate plus promotion review records.
The overall audit fails because finish_task also writes an auto-generated status accepted task_summary_memory under 60_Operations/task-summaries, and 60_Operations is indexed for default retrieval.
Validation was static only because node/npm are not on PATH in this shell.
next_steps: Change task summary growth records so unreviewed generated summaries are not marked accepted or are excluded from default retrieval until reviewed.
Add a regression test that fails if finish_task auto-growth creates any default-retrievable auto_generated status accepted record outside an explicitly reviewed path.
Run npm run check and the focused verification scripts once the portable Node/npm runtime is available on PATH.
search_queries: finish_task knowledge growth candidate memory reviewed accepted pollution used_memory_paths
